description: LDAP Global Catalog — forest-wide read-only directory. Useful for cross-domain enumeration in multi-domain forests. Port 389 provides the full LDAP toolset for single-domain queries.

tools.name: ldapsearch — Global Catalog Queries
tools.description: LDAP queries against the Global Catalog for forest-wide enumeration across domain boundaries.

commands.title: Discover forest naming contexts
commands.description: Query the Global Catalog root DSE to discover all domains in the forest.

commands.title: Enumerate all forest users
commands.description: Enumerate all users across all domains in the forest.

commands.title: Enumerate all forest computers
commands.description: List all computers across the entire forest.

commands.title: Enumerate all forest groups
commands.description: List all groups across the entire forest.

commands.title: Find Enterprise Admins (forest-wide)
commands.description: Find Enterprise Admins group members via the Global Catalog.

commands.title: Find Schema Admins (forest-wide)
commands.description: Find Schema Admins group members via the Global Catalog.

commands.title: Enumerate all domain trusts in forest
commands.command: ldapsearch -x -H ldap://{{IP}}:3268 -D '{{USERNAME}}@{{DOMAIN}}' -w '{{PASSWORD}}' -b '{{BASEDN}}' '(objectClass=trustedDomain)' cn trustDirection trustType flatName
commands.description: Enumerate all trust relationships across the forest.

commands.title: Find SPNs across forest (Kerberoastable)
commands.description: Find Kerberoastable accounts across all domains in the forest.

commands.title: Find AdminCount=1 across forest
commands.description: Find all protected admin accounts across the entire forest.

commands.title: Anonymous bind — dump GC root
commands.description: Attempt anonymous bind against the Global Catalog.

tools.name: NetExec (nxc) — Global Catalog
tools.description: NetExec LDAP queries targeting the Global Catalog port for forest-wide enumeration.

commands.title: Authenticated bind to GC
commands.description: Test credentials against the Global Catalog service.

commands.title: Enumerate users via GC
commands.description: List all users across the forest via the Global Catalog.
